name: Nexa Taxi - Goedkope RAG + PostgreSQL Assistant

parameters.query:
SELECT d.title, d.category, d.content
FROM nexa_taxi.knowledge_documents d
WHERE $1::text <> ''
  AND (
    d.title ILIKE '%' || $1 || '%'
    OR d.content ILIKE '%' || $1 || '%'
    OR d.category ILIKE '%' || $1 || '%'
    OR EXISTS (
      SELECT 1
      FROM nexa_taxi.knowledge_chunks c
      WHERE c.document_id = d.id
        AND c.chunk_text ILIKE '%' || $1 || '%'
    )
  )
ORDER BY d.created_at DESC NULLS LAST
LIMIT 5;
